dashboard.title: Student Dashboard
dashboard.subtitle: Here's your learning journey today
dashboard.momentum: Keep up the momentum — every step counts.
dashboard.noDeadlines: No upcoming deadlines. Enjoy the break.
dashboard.completeOnboardingDesc: Finish your profile to unlock personalized recommendations and earn XP.
dashboard.completeAssessmentDesc: You skipped some sections during onboarding. Complete them to get full personalization.

completeProfile.label: Complete your onboarding
completeProfile.description: Finish your profile to unlock personalized recommendations and earn XP.

finishProfile.label: Complete your assessment
finishProfile.description: You skipped some sections during onboarding. Complete them to get full personalization.

submitAssignment.label: Submit your next assignment
submitAssignment.description: {{title}} is due soon — submit it to stay on track.

continueCourse.label: Continue your course
continueCourse.description: Pick up where you left off and keep your momentum going.

reviewFeedback.label: Review your feedback
reviewFeedback.description: See your latest grades and feedback to learn from your work.

team.title: My Team
team.unassignedTitle: You're not on a team yet
team.howItWorksDescription: Teams let you learn alongside classmates — you earn XP together, climb the team leaderboard, and take on shared challenges. Join an existing team or create your own to get started.
team.teacherAssignNote: Your teacher may also assign you to a team for your course.

courses.title: My Courses
courses.subtitle: View your enrolled courses, progress, and assignments.

plainSummary.title: How your habits are going
plainSummary.empty: You haven't logged any habits yet. Pick one small habit to start today!
plainSummary.completion: You've kept up {{rate}}% of your daily habits.
plainSummary.streak: You're on a {{count}}-day streak — keep it going!
plainSummary.encourage: Every small step counts. Keep it up!

prompts.title: Reflection prompts
prompts.hint: Pick a prompt to get started, or just write freely below.

leaderboard.title: Leaderboard
leaderboard.anonymousHint: Your name is hidden from other students

locked.title: Leaderboard unlocks when more students join
locked.description: Once more students join your cohort, rankings and medals will appear here. Keep earning XP in the meantime!

portfolio.title: My Portfolio
portfolio.permissionRequired: Public sharing requires school permission. Your portfolio stays private until your school turns it on.

toast.permissionDenied: Public sharing isn't enabled for your account yet. Ask your school to grant permission.

personality.title: Discover How You Learn Best
personality.description: A few quick questions reveal how you work and study best.
personality.benefit1: Personalized study recommendations tailored to you
personality.benefit2: AI Tutor responses customized to how you learn
personality.benefit3: Earn bonus XP for completing your profile

learning_style.title: Find Your Learning Style
learning_style.description: Explore the ways you take in and remember new ideas.
learning_style.benefit1: Study tips matched to your preferences
learning_style.benefit2: AI Tutor explanations in the format that works for you
learning_style.benefit3: Earn bonus XP for completing this assessment

self_efficacy.title: Academic Confidence Check
self_efficacy.description: Tell us how confident you feel so we can support you better.
self_efficacy.benefit1: Encouragement and goals set at the right level for you
self_efficacy.benefit2: AI Tutor support focused where you want to grow
self_efficacy.benefit3: Earn bonus XP for completing this check

study_strategy.title: Sharpen Your Study Habits
study_strategy.description: Share how you study today so we can suggest what works.
study_strategy.benefit2: AI Tutor coaching tuned to your habits
study_strategy.benefit3: Earn bonus XP for completing this assessment

microAssessment.title: Quick {{type}} Check
microAssessment.description_one: {{count}} quick question to refine your profile.
microAssessment.description_other: {{count}} quick questions to refine your profile.
microAssessment.lastChance: Last chance — this will be skipped if dismissed again.
microAssessment.completeError: Could not complete the check. Please try again.
microAssessment.remindedLater: No problem — we'll remind you later.
microAssessment.dismissError: Could not update the check. Please try again.

selfEfficacy.title: Academic Confidence Check
selfEfficacy.instructions: Rate how confident you feel about each statement.

personality.title: Personality Assessment
personality.noQuestions: No personality questions available. Please contact your administrator.

learningStyle.title: Learning Style Preferences
learningStyle.instructions: Choose the option that best fits you.
learningStyle.noQuestions: No learning style questions available. Please contact your administrator.
learningStyle.disclaimer: Learning style preferences are provided as a self-awareness exercise. Research does not support matching instruction to VARK styles (Pashler et al., 2008). Your results will not be used to restrict content delivery.

day1.title: Learning Style Assessment
day1.body: This assessment will be delivered as short daily micro-assessments over your first two weeks. You'll earn XP for each one!

studyStrategy.title: Study Strategy Inventory
studyStrategy.instructions: Rate how often you use each study strategy.
studyStrategy.noQuestions: No study strategy questions available. Please contact your administrator.

day1.title: Study Strategy Inventory
day1.body: This assessment will be delivered as short daily micro-assessments during your first two weeks. You'll earn XP for each one!

fallback.noQuestionsTitle: No confidence check needed right now
fallback.noQuestionsBody: There are no confidence questions for you at the moment. You can continue with the rest of your setup.
fallback.systemIssueBody: Something went wrong loading these questions. You can keep going and we'll try again later.

goals.exampleHint: Set a goal below to track your week.

quiz.unableToLoad: Unable to load quiz. Please go back and try again.

recovery.title: Recovery Required
recovery.body: You have an active mastery recovery pathway for a CLO linked to this quiz. Complete the recovery steps before retrying.

toast.startFailed: Failed to start quiz. Please try again.
toast.submitFailed: Failed to submit quiz. Please try again.
toast.nextFailed: Failed to load next question. Please try again.
toast.selectAnswer: Please select an answer before submitting.
toast.timeUp: Time is up! Submitting your quiz...

feedback.correctBody: Great job — check the post-quiz review for a detailed explanation.
feedback.reviewLater: Review the correct answer and explanation after the quiz.

review.title: Quiz Review
review.loadFailed: Failed to load quiz review. Please try again.

createTeam.title: Create Team
createTeam.noCoursesAvailable: No courses with student-formed teams available.
createTeam.noAvailableStudents: No available students in this course.
createTeam.selectAtLeastOne: Select at least 1 member (team needs 2-6 total).

validation.nameMin: Team name must be at least 2 characters

toast.created: Team created! You are the captain.

surveys.title: Surveys
surveys.alreadyCompleted: You have already completed this survey.

toast.answerAtLeastOne: Please answer at least one question

error.forbiddenBody: This portfolio is private. The student has not enabled public sharing, or their school has not granted permission.
error.notFoundBody: We could not find a portfolio for this link. It may have been removed or the link may be incorrect.
